bridge_url.description: Local Codex bridge endpoint visible from the AstrBot container.

token_file.description: Token file mounted into the AstrBot container.

secret_drop_file.description: Host-local temporary file used for explicit secret handoff commands such as GitHub PAT delivery. The secret is not echoed back or forwarded to Codex chat history.

allowed_sender_ids.description: QQ sender IDs allowed to trigger Codex. Empty list allows everyone.

handle_prefix.description: Optional message prefix. Empty means every received QQ message is handled.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for Codex.

ack_message.description: Message sent before Codex starts working. Empty disables it.
ack_message.default: 大管家已收到，开始安排处理。

progress_enabled.description: Send periodic progress messages while waiting for Codex.

progress_first_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before sending the first progress message.

progress_interval_seconds.description: Seconds between progress messages after the first one.

progress_detail_chars.description: Maximum characters of bridge progress detail included in each progress/status message.

stream_progress_enabled.description: Let the local bridge push throttled live stdout/stderr/progress updates to QQ instead of relying on periodic status polling.

stream_progress_interval_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between live progress pushes.

stream_progress_detail_chars.description: Maximum characters included in each live progress push.

astrbot_history_enabled.description: Persist QQ remote messages to AstrBot native platform history.

history_platform_id.description: Platform ID used for AstrBot native history. Empty uses the incoming platform name.

history_creator.description: AstrBot WebUI username that owns the mirrored QQ sessions.

context_history_enabled.description: Send recent AstrBot history to the Codex bridge for better context.

context_history_messages.description: Number of recent persisted messages included in each Codex request.

incoming_simplify_chinese.description: Convert incoming QQ text, including STT transcriptions, to Simplified Chinese before command matching and Codex forwarding.

stt_cleanup_enabled.description: Clean common STT whitespace, punctuation, and filler transcription noise before forwarding to Codex.

image_input_enabled.description: Forward QQ image messages to Codex as image attachments when local files can be resolved.

max_image_attachments.description: Maximum number of image attachments forwarded to one Codex request.

container_data_root.description: AstrBot data root path inside the Docker container.

host_data_root.description: AstrBot data root path on the host, used so the local Codex bridge can read image files.

max_reply_chars.description: Maximum characters sent back to QQ.

voice_reply_enabled.description: Send the final Codex reply back to QQ as a voice message when synthesis succeeds.

voice_reply_include_text.description: Also send the final reply as text before the voice message.

voice_reply_voice.description: Voice id used by the host bridge. Edge examples: zh-TW-HsiaoChenNeural, zh-TW-HsiaoYuNeural, zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural. Kokoro examples: zf_017, zf_021, zf_001. macOS say examples: Tingting.

voice_reply_engine.description: Host-side voice synthesis engine. Use edge for a softer neural voice, kokoro for open-source neural TTS, or say for macOS fallback.

voice_reply_rate.description: macOS say speech rate for voice replies.

voice_reply_speed.description: Kokoro speech speed multiplier for voice replies.

voice_reply_max_chars.description: Maximum characters included in synthesized QQ voice. Full text can still be sent as text.

voice_reply_timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for host-side voice synthesis.

voice_reply_container_dir.description: Voice reply directory inside the AstrBot container.

voice_reply_host_dir.description: Voice reply directory on the host, mapped to voice_reply_container_dir.
